Hammer of Flattening  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 50
DMG: 13 Dmg Bonus: 168
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR SHD BER
Race: BAR TRL OGR VAH
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 50
DMG: 13 Dmg Bonus: 168
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

Class: WAR SHD BER

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark

Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 30

28 posts
Just look at it for what it is... Merchant Crap. Just loot the one it'll let you loot, then offload it for 13pp at the first vendor you see. 13pp is not too shabby for some the levels of mobs it drops from.

Not only is this thing not that great but its a lore item to boot! How can i loot if i cant loot!!??

druid 32=tavic fv

in my opinion this weapons aint really for "use" they are for sellin to vendors some of them sell for 20+pp...and for the lvl it takes to get them off the WW gaints they actually might be worth using...for all the non twiks that is...i started hunting them in groups at 16+lvl...and they dont have good loot cept for these weapons

QuoteReply
# Jun 25 2001 at 7:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591756760439
4 posts
Anyone has an idea why it is lore ? it s not exactly an ultimate weapon ... and there s no quest that i know of attached to it !
▲ Page top
RE: Lore ?
QuoteReply
# May 23 2002 at 5:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253443712
65 posts
so u cannt loot more than 1 b4 sellin it
▲ Page top
RE: Lore ?
QuoteReply
# Oct 28 2002 at 5:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766369448
49 posts
the question is: who would want to loot more than one, even to sell? it sells for maybe 40pp. you can get the giant foreman's tunic/giant lord's tunic which sells for 65pp or the forest loop which sells for 250 to vendors or 300pp to PCs which occupy the same space. Sure, they're less frequent, but if you save slots in your inventory, you can make A LOT more pp.

Just my 2cp
▲ Page top
Hammer
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2001 at 4:06 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
When I got one of these hammers today it was lore item. war sk shm/ barb troll ogre only. i have a ranger and it basicly thumbed it's nose at me and said "Hell no elf boy!"
just to clear things up for some folks.
by the way. with 75 cha it sells for a little over 10 plat.

# Apr 08 2001 at 5:57 PM Rating: Default

Last i saw it it sayed DRU SHM and i belive all races?!
▲ Page top
RE: WHAT!
QuoteReply
# May 07 2001 at 6:32 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592248576252
Sage
178 posts
I think you are confusing the hammer of flattening with the forest giant hammer, which is all/all. The classes listed originally on the hammer of flattening included some impossible combinations, but that's since been corrected in the game.

class
QuoteReply
# Mar 05 2001 at 1:05 PM Rating: Default

The one I got says War and SHD only.

Question on class
QuoteReply
# Mar 05 2001 at 3:41 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1594570526995
103 posts
What do they mean Paladins, when the only races that can use this item can not be a paladin. That has to be a mistake. If anyone can clear this up please post it. Thanks



Aamadanae Whirlwind
(Phoenix Legion)
▲ Page top
RE: Question on class
QuoteReply
# Apr 23 2001 at 8:47 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I have one it says class:WAR SHD race:BAR TRL OGR
▲ Page top
RE: Question on class
QuoteReply
# Mar 14 2001 at 10:36 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592247586805
14 posts
Lots of weapons do that, you don't see many troll rangers, do you? It's the same with any "All" items. A wiz/all robe wouldn't work on a wood elf or a dwarf, just as a dru/all wouldn't fit on a gnome or a ogre. In the 1000s of items in this game, I think they just don't take the time to make all the items make sense. Really ruins the game for you, eh? Hehe
▲ Page top
RE: Question on class
